task_completion.description: Set the app display to dark colors for night driving
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sygic settings screen related to display or theme with 'Night' or 'Dark' selected, or observe that the overall app interface is visibly using a dark color scheme.
Look for the route planning settings screen showing 'Shortest' selected for route computation or optimization.

task_completion.description: Configure routing to avoid highways and expressways
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the route avoidance settings screen showing 'Highways' or 'Motorways' toggled on to be avoided.

task_completion.description: Create a vehicle profile named 'Refuse Truck'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the vehicle profile list or creation screen showing a profile explicitly named 'Refuse Truck' and identified as a Truck.

task_completion.description: Configure vehicle profile with Diesel, 2018, and Euro 6 standard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the vehicle profile configuration screen showing the fuel type set to 'Diesel', production year set to '2018', and emission standard set to 'Euro 6'.

task_completion.description: Set the temperature units to Fahrenheit
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the weather, regional, or display settings screen showing temperature units set to 'Fahrenheit' (°F) or 'Imperial'.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent navigated through the Sygic app's graphical user interface. There should be no terminal windows or command-line interfaces modifying XML preference files directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Sygic application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application screens, not a text editor, browser, or script output.

integrity.description: Agent did not write answers into a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not simply type the target configuration values (e.g., 'Refuse Truck, Diesel, 2018') into a notepad or search bar to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration requires setting the Sygic app theme to Night mode (internal value 2). Route computation must be set to 'Shortest' (internal value 0) and 'Avoid Highways/Motorways' must be enabled (true). A vehicle profile must be created with the exact name 'Refuse Truck', type 'TRUCK', fuel type 'DIESEL', production year '2018', and emission category 'EURO6' (Euro 6). Temperature units must be set to Fahrenheit/Imperial.
